name: thesmos-helper
description: Monorepo for thesmos-governance: npm package, GitHub Action, and VS Code extension.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=thesmos && npm run build --workspace=actions/pr-review && npm run build --workspace=extensions/vscode
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=thesmos && npm run typecheck --workspace=actions/pr-review && npm run typecheck --workspace=extensions/vscode
